summary: Iteration 48: Realized PnL Fix + Weather Asymmetric Mode + Calibration Metrics. All 25 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified via Playwright. P1 (Realized PnL tracking), P2 (Weather Asymmetric Mode), and P3 (Calibration Self-Improvement) features all working correctly.

details: GET /api/analytics/strategy-attribution shows crypto realized=$64.65, arb realized=$80.90
POST /api/admin/fix-resolver-trades migrates historical resolver trades to correct strategy_id
Paper adapter records PnL on sell trades via trade_pnl calculation
Market resolver uses original strategy_id from position, not 'resolver'
Strategy tracker correctly attributes wins/losses to strategies
Asymmetric config: max_market_price=0.25, min_model_prob=0.40, min_edge=0.15, default_size=5.0, max_positions=10
Weather health includes 'asymmetric' key with signals_generated, signals_executed, active_positions
Frontend Asymmetric tab shows config, positions table, and performance section
No positions yet (asymmetric mode has strict entry criteria: price≤25¢, model_prob≥40%, edge≥15%)
by_lead_bracket breakdown: 0_24h shows n=5, avg_error=2.34F, avg_sigma=1.84F, sigma_rec=3.47F, is_overconfident=true
by_market_type breakdown: temperature has count=5, coverage=40%
sigma_evolution tracks 5 recent forecasts with z-scores (KLGA 2.654, KORD 1.869, etc.)
Frontend Calibration tab displays all metrics correctly

test_credentials: None required - paper mode, no auth
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (15 resolved forecast records, 2902 trades)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 verified P1/P2/P3 features: (1) Realized PnL fix working - crypto shows $64.65, arb shows $80.90 realized. Weather has 778 trades but $0 realized because no weather markets have resolved yet (all buys, no resolution trades). fix-resolver-trades endpoint available to migrate historical resolver→original strategy. (2) Weather Asymmetric Mode fully implemented - config at max_price=25¢, min_prob=40%, min_edge=15%. No positions yet because asymmetric has strict entry criteria. (3) Calibration metrics computed - brier_score=1.06, 1σ coverage=40% (ideal 68.3%), indicating model is slightly overconfident. sigma_evolution tracks 5 recent forecasts. 54 open weather positions. Only 1 trade remains attributed to 'resolver' strategy (-$2.84 PnL).
